title: Export to Excel on My Work screen
excerpt: Would love to see an export to Excel button added to the My Work screen so we can export the view once filtered by date, take that to print/format and provide a hardcopy version to executive leader/drive weekly team meet…

posts.author: Mary2 (Mary Brown)
posts.cookedHtml: Would love to see an export to Excel button added to the My Work screen so we can export the view once filtered by date, take that to print/format and provide a hardcopy version to executive leader/drive weekly team meetings.

posts.author: MASO (Markus @ Gorilla Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Mary2

I can’t add an Export to Excel button on your work screen, but I can suggest to try out Spreadsheet Gorilla. Just in case you are okay with using third party apps.

Imagine getting that exported Excel file ready-to-use right in your inbox an hour or two before your next meeting. You might only want to apply some individual formattings and maybe double check some numbers. Anything else is done on auto-pilot, by setting up all the filters, the sorting etc. once and beforehand – all without touching the actual board. Okay, the app can’t provide a hardcopy version neither

If this sounds promising, feel free to try it out. I’m keen to get any feedback.

– Markus from Gorilla Apps

P.S. We are currently reworking the custom filters, expect them to be readded within the next week.
